rulings.Case Title: AYRIE ARANDA et al VS. EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 05, 2014 line 5. DEFENDANTS MARINERS PAC 3 HOLDINGS, LLC and BSI FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Defendant's Demurrer to the first cause of action and the third cause of action is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Service did not owe a duty of care. Defendant's Demurrer to the second cause of action is OVERRULED. See Garcia v. World Savings, FSB (2010) 183 Cal.App.4th 1031. = (501/LOT)- LATE TENTATIVE
